children.name: Sthenoteuthis
children.description: Sthenoteuthis — a genus of flying squids in the family Ommastrephidae.

children.name: Sthenoteuthis oualaniensis
children.description: The purpleback flying squid or purpleback squid (Sthenoteuthis oualaniensis) is a species of cephalopod in the family Ommastrephidae, occurring in the Indo-Pacific.

children.name: Sthenoteuthis pteropus
children.description: Sthenoteuthis pteropus, also known as the orangeback flying squid or orangeback squid, is a species of cephalopod in the family Ommastrephidae.

children.name: Ornithoteuthis
children.description: Ornithoteuthis — a genus of flying squids in the family Ommastrephidae.

children.name: Ornithoteuthis antillarum
children.description: Ornithoteuthis antillarum, the Atlantic bird squid, is a species of flying squid from the family Ommastrephidae which is found in the warmer waters of the Atlantic Ocean.

children.name: Ornithoteuthis volatilis
children.description: Ornithoteuthis volatilis, the shiny bird squid, is a squid from the subfamily Ommastrephinae, the flying squids, of the family Ommastrephidae part of the pelagic squid order Oegopsida.

children.name: Todaropsis
children.description: Todaropsis — a genus of flying squids in the family Ommastrephidae.

children.name: Ommastrephes
children.description: Ommastrephes — a genus of flying squids in the family Ommastrephidae.

children.name: Ommastrephes brevimanus
children.description: {{Speciesbox | taxon = Ommastrephes brevimanus | authority = (Gould, 1852) | synonyms = }} Ommastrephes brevimanus is a species of flying squid in the family Ommastrephinae native to the Kermadec Islands.

children.name: Ommastrephes caroli
children.description: Ommastrephes caroli — a species in the genus Ommastrephes, family Ommastrephidae. Also known as flying squids.

children.name: Ommastrephes cylindraceus
children.description: Ommastrephes cylindraceus — a species in the genus Ommastrephes, family Ommastrephidae. Also known as flying squids.

children.name: Illex
children.description: Illex — a genus of flying squids in the family Ommastrephidae.

children.name: Illex argentinus
children.description: Illex argentinus, commonly known as the Argentine shortfin squid, is a species of squid in the family Ommastrephidae from the south western Atlantic Ocean.

children.name: Illex coindetii
children.description: Illex coindetii, commonly known as the southern shortfin squid or broadtail shortfin squid, is a species of neritic squids in the family Ommastrephidae.

children.name: Illex illecebrosus
children.description: Illex illecebrosus, commonly known as the northern shortfin squid, is a species of neritic squids in the family Ommastrephidae.

children.name: Illex oxygonius
children.description: Illex oxygonius, commonly known as the sharptail shortfin squid, is a species of neritic squids in the family Ommastrephidae.

children.name: Nototodarus
children.description: Nototodarus — a genus of flying squids in the family Ommastrephidae.

children.name: Nototodarus hawaiiensis
children.description: Nototodarus hawaiiensis, the Hawaiian flying squid, is a species of squid.

children.name: Nototodarus sloanii
children.description: {{Speciesbox |image = Nototodarus sloanii.jpg |image_caption = Dorsal and ventral view of Nototodarus sloanii | status = LC | status_system = IUCN3.1 | status_ref = | taxon = Nototodarus sloanii | display_parents = 3 |authority = (Gray, 1849) |synonyms = *Ommastrephes sloanii Gray, 1849 *Todarodes sloanei (Gray, 1849) *Todarodes sloanei sloanei (Gray, 1849) | synonyms_ref = }} Nototodarus sloanii is a species of squid commonly known as the New Zealand arrow squid or Wellington flying squid.
